column1: #Text=All three of us, waiting for something to happen.
#Text=I would have pulled the trigger by now, blown the two of us sky-high... if it weren't for him.
#Text=You would have been gone by now if you'd actually thought I would shoot.
#Text=But I won't, and you know I won't, because he's here.
#Text="This is growing very boring very quickly," you say, and nod to someone, somewhere over my head.
#Text=I move, trying to cover him with my body so the bullet will hit me instead, but before I can take a step there's the sound of a gunshot, deafening.
#Text=He's on the ground now, bleeding but alive.
#Text=Still alive, so I can keep breathing for now.
#Text=I look to you helplessly, begging with my eyes.
#Text=But you just smirk and snap your fingers and walk out, and I'm left alone with him.
#Text=I fall to my knees next to him.
#Text=I reach for him, needing to touch him, needing to feel him breathing, needing to feel his heart beating beneath my hand, but he intercepts my hand halfway and curls his fingers around mine.
#Text="Stay with me," he whispers, his voice ragged, and I have to fight to choke back a sob.
#Text=My voice sounds a lot more broken than I'd like.
#Text="Sher..." he tries to say my name.
#Text="No," I say, tears rolling down my face now.
#Text=I don't bother trying to conceal them.
#Text=How can you burn the heart out of me when you've already shot him dead?

#Text=He's gone now, gone forever, and I'm left here alone, sobbing, cradling his head in my arms and burying my face in that awful jumper that I used to hate so much, that's now soaked with his blood.
#Text=I realise that my hand is still clutching his.
#Text=Slowly, I loosen my grip, and his cold hand drops to the ground.
#Text=It should make next to no noise, but somehow it echoes throughout the pool, reverberating through me until it's all I can hear, feel, see, the ache consuming me.
#Text=Could I die from this much pain?
#Text=He was supposed to stay, to be okay, to be alive even after I'm gone.
#Text=He was the one constant in my life, the one person who never left no matter what I did, what I said.
#Text=I'll do whatever it takes to find you, and I'll kill you slowly and painfully until you beg for mercy.
